slides.headline: The transformation rests on three reinforcing pillars — commercial, operational, and digital

columns.title: Commercial Excellence
bullets: Assortment optimization using demand sensing AI
Category management redesign with vendor co-investment

columns.title: Operational Efficiency
bullets: Warehouse network consolidation from 14 to 5 sites
Last-mile delivery partnership with 3 regional carriers
Lean Six Sigma deployment in top 200 stores

columns.title: Digital & Analytics
bullets: Unified commerce platform replacing 4 legacy systems
Customer data platform with real-time personalization
AI-powered demand forecasting reducing stockouts by 40%

slides.source: McKinsey transformation architecture; workstream leads input
